description_long: This is a stylish low-top shoe featuring a smooth cream-colored upper with contrasting tan brown accents around the lacing area and heel. The shoe has a classic lace-up design with four pairs of eyelets and white laces, providing a secure fit. The sole is white with a subtle wave-like tread pattern, offering both grip and a modern aesthetic. The interior appears to be lined with a soft material for comfort, and the overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic leather and rubber. The shoe's silhouette is sleek and slightly rounded at the toe, making it suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A cream and tan low-top lace-up shoe with a white wavy sole and a sleek, modern design. The shoe features a smooth finish and is suitable for casual urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, cream upper, and white laces with tan accents around the lacing area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth cream upper, tan heel and lacing area, and the full length of the white wavy sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tan heel cap and the opening of the shoe, with the white sole visible at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cream upper, tan accents, and the wavy white sole.
